A few candidates: *concurrent* ( \| b$) on line 25 could use a brief footnote clarifying it means 'no causal relationship' rather than 'happening simultaneously.' The term *logical clock* itself might benefit from a note distinguishing it from wall-clock time. And *total-order broadcast* in the last paragraph of the Structured Programming section is fairly specialized — a footnote there could help.
